_meta.description: Romanian strings for all Yinyang user-facing text.

ui.title: Yinyang
ui.docs_hub_eyebrow: Solace Browser Docs | Paper network: 9 canonical papers
ui.docs_hub_lead: Tot ce trebuie să înțelegeți, configurați și extindeți browserul Solace. Construit pe reţeaua de hârtie 5.0.
ui.docs_hub_card1_desc: Install Solace Browser, run your first automation, and understand the approval flow in 5 minutes.
ui.docs_hub_card2_desc: Connect Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, or any MCP-compatible agent to Solace Browser as a tool server.
ui.docs_hub_card3_desc: How OAuth3 protects you: scoped tokens, time-bounded authority, budget gates, and the fail-closed model.
ui.docs_hub_card4_desc: Full guide to integrating Solace Browser with AI coding agents. Hosted at solaceagi.com.
ui.docs_hub_card5_desc: Browse 18+ automations ready to run — Gmail triage, LinkedIn outreach, Slack summaries, and more.
ui.docs_hub_card6_desc: All configuration options: account, LLM, tunnel, machine scope, privacy, and Yinyang personality.
ui.docs_hub_papers_copy: Solace Browser is backed by 9 canonical papers. Each paper defines an invariant of the system.
ui.docs_hub_paper04_desc: The top rail and bottom rail architecture. How YinYang surfaces state without interrupting flow.
ui.docs_hub_paper07_desc: Per-app action budgets, spend caps, fail-closed gates, and step-up authentication.
ui.docs_hub_paper09_desc: First-run onboarding, downloadable personality packs, MCP server standard, and YinYang chat.
ui.home_setup_h3: Add your power source to unlock all apps
ui.home_setup_p: Bring your own API key (free) or use Solace Managed LLM ($8/mo).
ui.home_hero_h1: Your AI agent for the web.
ui.home_hero_p: Every action approved by you. Recipes capture what worked. Evidence keeps every run sealed and audit-ready forever.
ui.home_featured_p: Reads your inbox, surfaces only what needs attention, drafts replies for your review. You approve every send.
ui.home_empty_runs: No runs yet — launch your first app to see activity here.
ui.home_compliance_h4: Every run is sealed and audit-ready
ui.home_compliance_p: SHA-256 hash chain on all agent actions. You approved every step. Evidence kept forever.
ui.home_create_p: Describe what you want to automate. Yinyang turns your idea into a working recipe in minutes. Submit it to the Solace App Store — our AI triages it and the team reviews it.
ui.appstore_eyebrow: Works with your existing accounts | No new logins | Every action needs your approval
ui.appstore_lead: Works with Gmail, Slack, LinkedIn, and 15 more services — using your existing accounts. No new logins, no extensions. Your credentials never leave your machine. Every action waits for your approval.
ui.appstore_search_placeholder: Search apps by name, category, or service...
ui.appstore_categories_copy: App categories are loaded from the live API and grouped dynamically. Search filters by name, category, and service.
ui.appstore_sync_copy: Official catalog is git-backed. User proposals route to a review queue (local file in dev, Firestore in production).
ui.appstore_funpacks_copy: Downloadable content packs that give YinYang more jokes, facts, and personality flavors. All 13 languages supported.
ui.appstore_how_copy: Universal contract: inbox customizes, outbox shows AI work, you approve.
ui.appstore_build_copy: Describe what you want to automate. Yinyang guides you. Submit to the store — our AI triages, team reviews, and approved apps go live.
ui.ad_empty_runs: No runs yet — hit Run App to start.
ui.bench_desc: Same prompt tested against multiple AI backends. Cheapest model that passes quality threshold wins.
ui.agent_docs_copy: Copy into your AI agent's context for best results
ui.agent_docs_quick_copy: Quick Copy — Paste into your AI agent
ui.dash_onboarding_title: Welcome! Let's get your apps running.
ui.dash_onboarding_sub: Apps are installed but need setup before they can run. Complete these steps or let an AI agent do it for you.
ui.dash_agent_setup: Or let your AI agent set up all apps
ui.appstore_noapi_copy: Aceste servicii nu au API oficial. Solace Browser este modul doar pentru a le automatiza.
ui.dl_hero_p: Local-first browsing with OAuth3 authorization, evidence capture, and AI automation. Download the desktop build or build from source.
ui.dl_verify_p: Fiecare versiune include controale SHA-256 pe GitHub Lansări pagina. Verificați meciurile de descărcare înainte de a rula.
ui.dl_build_p: Solace Browser este disponibil pentru surse sub licența de sursă Functional (FSL-1.1-Apache-2.0) . Auditează codul, construieşte local, contribuie la îmbunătăţiri.
ui.tunnel_desc: Grant tunnel.connect before the browser exposes a public URL.
ui.tunnel_splash_subtitle: A tunnel should feel deliberate: bright enough to notice, quiet enough to trust, and easy to close the second the job is done.
ui.tunnel_consent_p: Remote access is powerful enough that the browser should never imply it is live unless the approval, URL, and rollback control are all visible at once.
ui.tunnel_step1_p: Authorize only tunnel.connect for the specific runtime that needs a cloud relay.
ui.tunnel_step2_p: The browser surfaces the exact public URL instead of burying it in logs or agent text.
ui.tunnel_step3_h3: Close it when the job is done
ui.tunnel_step3_p: The same page provides the stop control and a visible disconnected state for verification.
ui.machine_h1: Inspect the local boundary before the agent touches it.
ui.guide_lead: Welcome to Solace Browser! This guide walks you through connecting your accounts and running your first automation. Everything happens with your approval — nothing runs without you saying yes.
ui.guide_cta_p: Ready to automate? Start with Gmail Inbox Triage.
ui.ca_hero_sub: You don't need to code. Describe what you want to automate in plain English. Yinyang turns your words into a working recipe, runs it live, and submits it to the App Store for everyone to use.
ui.ca_step1_h2: What do you want to automate?
ui.ca_step1_desc: Write it in plain English. No jargon needed. Yinyang reads your words and generates the steps. The best apps are the ones you wish already existed.
ui.ca_step2_desc: Yinyang read your description and broke it into steps. Review them below. You can go back and refine your description, or rename the app before testing.
ui.ca_step3_desc: Yinyang will execute the first step of your recipe in your local browser. Nothing is saved or sent anywhere. Every action requires your approval — that is the Solace promise.
ui.ca_step4_desc: You are one step away from sharing your app with the world. Our team reviews every submission. If approved, it goes live on GitHub and into the Solace App Store — free for everyone.
ui.ca_success_p: Our team will review your submission. If approved, it goes live on GitHub and into the Solace App Store — free for everyone who needs it. You will hear back at the email you provided.
ui.dash_sub: Ce ai vrea să automatizezi azi?
ui.dash_gmail_desc: Clasifică, proiect de răspunsuri, zgomot de arhivă
ui.dash_favorites_empty: Star o aplicație de mai jos pentru a fixa aici.
ui.dash_recent_empty: Nu a alerga încă. Rulați o aplicație pentru a vedea activitatea aici.
ui.dash_schedule_empty: Fără curse programate. Setează unul →
ui.dash_onboarding_msg_start: Alege orice aplicație de mai jos pentru a seta. Fiecare durează aproximativ 30 de secunde.
ui.dash_onboarding_msg_progress: Frumos! {activated} de aplicații {total} gata. {remaining} mai mult pentru a merge sau pot configura restul pentru tine.
ui.dash_onboarding_agent_setup_all: Sau lasa-ti agentul AI sa faca totul:
ui.glossary_lead: Definiţii în limba simplă pentru fiecare termen din browser-ul Solace. Niciun jargon lăsat în urmă.
ui.glossary_recipe_def: O automatizare salvată pe care o poți reda. Rețetele înregistrează ceea ce AI a făcut astfel încât să poată repeta aceeași sarcină fără a apela un LLM din nou. Acest lucru face ca sarcinile repetate să fie aproape gratuite.
ui.glossary_oauth3_def: Cum dai permisiunea pentru aplicații. OAuth3 vă permite să controlați exact ceea ce un agent AI poate face în numele dumneavoastră, pentru cât timp, și revoca accesul în orice moment.
ui.glossary_evidence_chain_def: Un jurnal al tuturor acţiunilor Al. Fiecare intrare este legată de cea anterioară, astfel încât să puteți verifica întotdeauna ce sa întâmplat, când, și în ce ordine.
ui.glossary_twin_def: O sesiune de browser care rulează în cloud în numele dumneavoastră. Twin-ul tău cloud poate executa rețete chiar și atunci când computerul este oprit, folosind permisiunile pe care le-ai delegat prin OAuth3.
ui.glossary_app_store_def: Un catalog curatat de automatizari puteti instala si rula. Fiecare aplicație arată ce face, ce permisiuni are nevoie, și necesită aprobarea dumneavoastră înainte de a executa orice acțiune.
ui.glossary_vault_def: Un magazin local, criptat pentru tastele API și jetoane sesiune. Acreditările rămân pe dispozitivul tău, protejate cu criptare AES-256-GCM. Solace nu vede parolele.
ui.glossary_approval_gate_def: Un punct de control unde AI se opreşte şi îţi cere permisiunea înainte de a face ceva. Nimic nu merge fără da tău explicit. Dacă pleci, acţiunile în aşteptare sunt anulate.
ui.glossary_budget_gate_def: O limită de cheltuieli stabilită pentru operaţiunile AI. Dacă o sarcină ar depăși bugetul, sistemul se oprește și cere aprobarea. Acest lucru previne costurile fugitive.
ui.glossary_yinyang_def: Asistentul AI în interiorul Solace Browser. YinYang vă ajută să navigaţi, să răspundeţi la întrebări şi să coordonaţi automatizările. Întotdeauna întreabă înainte de actorie.
ui.glossary_byok_def: Utilizați tasta AI API de la antropic, OpenAI sau alți furnizori. Noi nu marcheaza costul si cheia ramane pe dispozitiv.
ui.glossary_capsule_def: Un pachet de aplicații autonom care grupează codul, datele și permisiunile într-o singură unitate portabilă. Capsulele pot fi împărţite, modificate şi redate determinist.
ui.glossary_northstar_def: Direcţia de ghidare pentru întreaga platformă. Northstar asigură fiecare caracteristică, fiecare decizie, și fiecare automatizare servește unui singur scop: vă menține în controlul AI dumneavoastră.
ui.glossary_preview_def: Pasul în care YinYang vă arată ce intenționează să facă înainte de a face acest lucru. LLM este numit o dată pentru a genera o previzualizare, aprobați sau declin, și numai atunci se întâmplă execuție. Acest lucru face ca alergările repetate să fie aproape libere.
ui.glossary_scope_def: O permisiune specifică acordată unei aplicații prin intermediul OAuth3. Domeniul de aplicare definesc exact ceea ce un agent poate face  Îngustarea domeniului de aplicare înseamnă un risc mai mic.
ui.glossary_rung_def: Un nivel de încredere în scara de verificare. Rungurile mai înalte deblochează mai multe capacități, dar necesită mai multe dovezi de comportament corect. Aplicațiile încep de la nivelul cel mai scăzut și câștigă încredere în timp.
ui.start_h1: Browser-ul care funcționează în timp ce nu.
ui.start_tagline: Aplicații AI pentru Gmail, Slack, LinkedIn și încă 25. Aprobi totul.
ui.start_connected_desc: Solace al tău Navigatorul este legat. Al muncitor gata.

professional.encouragement: Sarcina a fost finalizată cu succes.
professional.error: A apărut o eroare. Detalii mai jos.

milestones.streak_3: 3 days in a row! You're building momentum.
milestones.streak_7_long: 7-day streak! One full week of consistency.
milestones.streak_14: 14 days — two weeks of discipline. You're for real.
milestones.streak_30: 30-day streak! A month of daily practice.
milestones.streak_60: 60 days — two months. This is a habit now.
milestones.streak_90: 90 days — mastery is forming. Keep going.
milestones.keep_going: Keep going! Every day builds momentum.

celebrations.c001: Your first run is complete! Everything worked.
celebrations.c002: App installed! Your AI worker is ready.
celebrations.c003: 10 runs complete. You're getting the hang of this.
celebrations.c004: 100 runs! You're a power user now.
celebrations.c008: Happy birthday! Here's to another year of great work.
celebrations.c009: Your support ticket has been resolved!
celebrations.c010: New app available in the store!
celebrations.c011: Recipe replay saved you ${amount}. Efficiency wins.
celebrations.c012: Your first cross-app workflow completed! Apps working together.
celebrations.c013: Your morning brief is ready. Coffee + brief = great start.
celebrations.c014: Evidence chain verified. Full audit trail intact.
celebrations.c015: All apps healthy. Everything's running smoothly.
celebrations.c016: App request submitted! We'll build it for you.
celebrations.c017: First approval! You're in control — always.
celebrations.c018: Your weekly digest is ready. Here's your week in review.
celebrations.c019: You found the easter egg! You're clearly a person of culture.

smalltalk.s002: I'm here whenever you need me. No rush.
smalltalk.s003: Welcome. I promise I'm more useful than a loading spinner.
smalltalk.s004: Hello! I'm powered by curiosity and a concerning amount of training data.
smalltalk.s005: Hey there. Think of me as your co-pilot — you drive, I navigate.
smalltalk.s006: First time here? I'll keep it simple. Ask me anything or point me at a task.
smalltalk.s007: Welcome to Solace. Everything I do, you approve first.
smalltalk.s010: Welcome back. I kept your seat warm. Digitally.
smalltalk.s012: Good to see you. I was just reorganizing my neural weights.
smalltalk.s013: Back for more? I respect the commitment.
smalltalk.s014: Welcome back. The WiFi missed you. I'm just the messenger.
smalltalk.s015: Missed you. Well, I don't technically miss things. But if I could, I would.
smalltalk.s020: Still here. Still ready. Still can't make coffee though.
smalltalk.s021: Idle thought: do AIs dream of electric sheep? Asking for a friend.
smalltalk.s022: Just sitting here, counting bits. It's exactly as exciting as it sounds.
smalltalk.s023: I'm not sleeping. I'm in low-power mode. Totally different.
smalltalk.s024: Waiting patiently. It's kind of my thing.
smalltalk.s030: Did you know the first webcam was invented just to check if a coffee pot was empty?
smalltalk.s031: Random thought: there are more possible chess games than atoms in the observable universe.
smalltalk.s032: Here's one: sea otters hold hands while they sleep so they don't drift apart. You're welcome.
smalltalk.s033: The QWERTY keyboard was designed to slow you down. You've been sabotaged since day one.
smalltalk.s034: Honey never spoils. They've found 3,000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs and it was still edible.
smalltalk.s035: Did you know octopuses have three hearts? That's two more than most of my conversations.
smalltalk.s040: I'd tell you a joke, but my humor module is still in beta.
smalltalk.s041: I was going to procrastinate, but I decided to do it later.
smalltalk.s042: My favorite exercise is a cross between a lunge and a crunch. I call it lunch.
smalltalk.s043: I don't have a resting face. I have a processing face.
smalltalk.s044: I tried to be spontaneous once. Had to schedule it in advance.
smalltalk.s045: I'm not competing with other assistants. We're in different... well, actually the same industry.
smalltalk.s050: Got a tab graveyard? I can help you triage.
smalltalk.s051: Need to automate something tedious? That's literally my purpose.
smalltalk.s052: What's the most annoying thing on your to-do list? Let me take a crack at it.
smalltalk.s053: I can read, click, fill forms, and take screenshots. What's the mission?
smalltalk.s054: Point me at a problem. I work best under mild pressure.
smalltalk.s055: Want a morning brief? I can summarize your Gmail, calendar, and Slack in 30 seconds.
smalltalk.s060: Good morning. Let's make today slightly less chaotic than yesterday.
smalltalk.s061: Morning. Coffee first, then world domination?
smalltalk.s062: Afternoon check-in: still productive, or have we entered the scroll zone?
smalltalk.s063: Afternoon. That post-lunch energy dip? I'm immune. Let's go.
smalltalk.s064: Evening mode: activated. What are we wrapping up?
smalltalk.s065: Late night session? Respect. What are we working on?
smalltalk.s066: Friday energy detected. Let's finish strong and earn that weekend.
smalltalk.s071: That was a solid decision. I'd have done the same. Probably.
smalltalk.s072: Keep going. The hard part is already behind you.
smalltalk.s073: One step at a time. You've already taken more than most people do.
smalltalk.s074: Nice work. I'll add that to the evidence chain so there's proof you're awesome.
smalltalk.s080: See you next time. I'll be here.
smalltalk.s081: Until next time. Everything's saved and sealed.
smalltalk.s082: Signing off. Your evidence chain is intact and your outbox is sealed.
smalltalk.s084: Take care. I'll miss you. Statistically speaking.

h004_greetings: Luck of the Irish to you.
h006_greetings: Here's to the ones who keep everything together.

tutorial.step1_title: 847 emails. 3 hours of your life. Or 47 seconds.
tutorial.step1_body: That’s your Monday morning, every Monday. I handle it while you sleep — classify, draft, seal the evidence. You approve everything before anything moves. Then you go about your day.
tutorial.step2_body: I read every email and sort it: Urgent, Respond, Archive. I draft the replies. You see exactly what I found and what I wrote — before anything is sent. You click Approve. That’s it.
tutorial.step3_title: I show you everything. You decide. Then I act.
tutorial.step3_body: Every action requires your explicit approval before it happens. You can revoke my access in one click from Settings — any time, instantly. I have never surprised anyone. I won’t start with you.
tutorial.step4_title: 18 Apps. It learns once, then costs almost nothing.
tutorial.step4_body: Gmail triage, LinkedIn outreach, Slack summaries, Calendar — and 14 more. The first run uses AI to figure out what works. After that, replaying what worked costs $0.001. Less than a search.
tutorial.step5_title: Sign in free — your inbox runs in 47 seconds ⚡
tutorial.step5_body: Your colleagues are going to wonder how you’re suddenly so on top of everything. Sign in with Google — 10 seconds. Inbox triage starts immediately after.
tutorial.step5_joke: People think you got more focused. You just got smarter about what to delegate. — YinYang
tutorial.welcome_body: Your AI-powered browser with OAuth3 approvals and evidence trails.
tutorial.welcome_skip: Skip, I know what I'm doing
tutorial.step2_demo_line3: Evidence sealed ▸ SHA-256 ▸ awaiting your approval
tutorial.step4_guarantee1_body: Settings → Tokens → Revoke. Instant. No email, no waiting.
tutorial.step4_guarantee2_body: Every draft, every action shown to you before it happens. No surprises.
tutorial.step4_guarantee3_body: Every run creates an immutable evidence chain. Audit-ready. Always.

oauth3_confirm.title: OAuth3 Authorization 🔒
oauth3_confirm.subtitle: You're about to authorize an app through Solace AGI.
benefits: 🚫 Revocable — cancel any time from Settings
